title: Notice of Termination by the Government of the United States of America of Article VI of the Convention for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to Taxes on Income between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the United States of America signed at Washington on 16 April 1945 and Exchange of Notes modifying the termination to exclude United Kingdom territories
subject: TAXATION
